visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a brown off-shoulder top stands in a supermarket warehouse, specifically the freezer aisle of a Costco. She holds a large cardboard box labeled 'Ginseng Chicken Soup'. Behind her, glass-door freezers are filled with various frozen products. The Costco logo is prominently displayed as an overlay. (2) The woman points excitedly at the price tag on the freezer door and the box in her hands. The camera zooms in on the product packaging, showing a high-resolution photo of a bowl of chicken soup with ginseng and red dates. Yellow and red variety-style text overlays emphasize the low price per bag. (3) The scene shifts to a brightly lit indoor home setting, likely a living room. Two women sit at a wooden table. One is the same woman from before; the other wears a grey patterned bucket hat. They hold up a transparent plastic pouch filled with liquid soup and the product box to the camera. (4) A close-up shot shows a heavy orange ceramic pot on a kitchen stove. A hand using a patterned cloth pot holder lifts the lid, releasing a dense cloud of steam. Inside, a metal ladle stirs a clear broth containing chicken pieces, green onions, and red herbal dates. (5) The two women are back at the table, each holding a small white bowl and a spoon. They taste the soup with visible enjoyment, smile, and give double thumbs-up gestures toward the camera. Graphic overlays like 'Buy It All' and 'Sweet or Bitter?' appear to punctuate their reactions.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 一大鍋240元. [Slogan]: 人蔘雞湯. (2) [Subtitle]: 冬天要到了, 人蔘雞湯也出來了. (3) [Subtitle]: 哇這1,200公克, 然後有兩入才469元. (4) [Subtitle]: 所以一袋才234元. (5) [Variety]: 便. [Subtitle]: 這樣太便宜了吧. (6) [Subtitle]: 感覺很不錯, 回去看看它是不是真的像上面那樣. (7) [Variety]: 料多又實在. (8) [Subtitle]: 每一袋是1.2公斤, 這樣子只要245元. (9) [Subtitle]: 隔水加熱或直接加熱就可以用. (10) [Subtitle]: 來看看! (11) [Subtitle]: 料看起來很簡單, 可是最重要是味道好不好. (12) [Variety]: 是苦還是甜? [Subtitle]: 那你一定要試試這個加了桂圓紅棗的甜雞湯. (13) [Subtitle]: 它喝起來呢非常溫潤, 那雞肉也非常Q彈美味. (14) [Subtitle]: 就像是現煮的一樣, 那這人蔘非常的不苦. (15) [Subtitle]: 喝起來就很順口, 很暖心. (16) [Subtitle]: 我們覺得是非常可以回購的品項. (17) [Subtitle]: 你覺得好喝嗎? 一整鍋只要235元. (18) [Variety]: 買爆. [Subtitle]: 4人的家庭喝絕對沒有問題. (19) [Subtitle]: 輕鬆上一碗雞湯, 最重要這個油也很清澈, 不會負擔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a brown off-shoulder top. The other has dark hair and wears a grey patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a Costco warehouse freezer aisle with rows of refrigerated products. Moves to a domestic home interior with a table and household decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces a shopping deal over a fast-paced, upbeat acoustic guitar track. A sharp 'pop' sound effect accompanies the appearance of on-screen graphics. The speech rate is rapid, conveying excitement and high arousal. (2) The narration continues with dramatic pitch variability as she explains the cost per unit. The background music maintains a steady 4/4 rhythm. A quick 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition between the store footage and the product unboxing. (3) A distinct metallic 'clink' is heard as a heavy lid is removed, followed by the soft, rhythmic splashing sound of hot liquid being ladled. The background music remains continuous and cheerful, providing a warm acoustic texture. (4) Two female voices engage in a lively dialogue about the soup's taste. Their tones are friendly and comedic. A cartoon-style 'boing' sound effect punctuates a funny observation. The music swells slightly in volume during the final recommendation. (5) The audio track concludes with a final energetic slogan spoken in unison by both women. A bright 'ding' sound effect signifies the end of the review as the music fades out quickly after a final exclamation.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video reviews a specific Ginseng Chicken Soup product from Costco. It uses a value-driven hook followed by a cooking demonstration and a positive taste test to convince viewers of the product's quality and affordability, especially for winter consumption.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Reviewing a specific branded product from a named retailer (Costco) and providing a strong positive call-to-action ('buy it all').

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical social-media influencer style review with high energy, dense text overlays, and reaction-based editing to maintain viewer engagement.
